properties.description:
Data Flow to pull data from ADLS Stg to ADLS Raw.
No schema defined in source or Target, Schema drift was used along with column rules to direct data into Sink.

typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	WildPath as string,
	FileName as string
}
source(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'Filename',
	wildcardPaths:[($WildPath + $FileName + '.csv')]) ~> srcSpoolStatusReportStage
srcSpoolStatusReportStage derive(Filename = concat($WildPath,substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',$FileName,'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'Filename',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	mapColumn(
		Filename,
		each(match('PROJNAME'==upper(name)),
			'PROJNAME' = $$),
		each(match('PROJNO'==upper(name)),
			'PROJNO' = $$),
		each(match('DOC_ID'==upper(name)),
			'DOC_ID' = $$),
		each(match('DOCUMENT NUMBER'==upper(name)),
			'DOCUMENT NUMBER' = $$),
		each(match('REVISION'==upper(name)),
			'REVISION' = $$),
		each(match('REVISION DATE'==upper(name)),
			'REVISION DATE' = $$),
		each(match('TITLE'==upper(name)),
			'TITLE' = $$),
		each(match('ISSUE STATE'==upper(name)),
			'ISSUE STATE' = $$),
		each(match('TRANSMITTAL NUMBER'==upper(name)),
			'TRANSMITTAL NUMBER' = $$),
		each(match('TRANSMITTAL DATE'==upper(name)),
			'TRANSMITTAL DATE' = $$),
		each(match('DELIVERABLE'==upper(name)),
			'DELIVERABLE' = $$),
		each(match('IDOCS FOLDER'==upper(name)),
			'IDOCS FOLDER' = $$),
		each(match('REF DOC'==upper(name)),
			'REF DOC' = $$)
	)) ~> snkSpoolStatusRptRaw
